{"data":{"page":{"current_page":1,"total_page":1,"orderby":"shoucang","count":5,"comic_sort":"","search_key":"斗破苍穹","time":8},"data":[{"comic_id":86351,"comic_name":"沉香破","last_chapter_name":"最终话","comic_type":"lianai,恋爱|gufeng,古风|chuanyue,穿越","comic_newid":"chenxiangpo","comic_author":"三福动漫","renqi":111201766,"update_time":1485895775000,"shoucang":116422,"comic_grade":"2","cartoon_desc":"原本又聋又哑的二少奶奶突然开口说话！夫君腹黑，兄弟不合，妯娌相争，姐妹翻脸，外加妾室争宠……这一大家子，怎一个乱字了得？","cover_img":"http://image.yqmh.com/mh/86351_3_4.jpg-noresize.webp","has_video":0},{"comic_id":108533,"comic_name":"无限破狱者","last_chapter_name":"第56话 新世界","comic_type":"rexue,热血|dushi,都市|xuanyi,悬疑","comic_newid":"wuxianpoyuzhe","comic_author":"三福动漫","renqi":9259502,"update_time":1643622511000,"shoucang":7285,"comic_grade":"2","cartoon_desc":"【每周五更新】八狼因追寻哥哥的死亡原因而成为一名兢兢业业地狱管理员，直到某天新神上位六道原有体系崩溃，无辜女孩林小鹿也跌入地狱。为送林小鹿回家，也为了寻找哥哥的真相，八狼毅然收服了前神灵牙铸，和林小鹿一起踏上了寻觅之路。穿越六大世界，遇到种种奇怪事件，八狼一往无前，追寻至世界尽头，直面新神……","cover_img":"http://image.yqmh.com/mh/108533_3_4.jpg-noresize.webp","has_video":0},{"comic_id":107042,"comic_name":"宫斗不如跑江湖","last_chapter_name":"第15话","comic_type":"gaoxiao,搞笑|lianai,恋爱|gufeng,古风","comic_newid":"gongdouburupaojianghu","comic_author":"极漫文化","renqi":91303252,"update_time":1556287281000,"shoucang":73389,"comic_grade":"2","cartoon_desc":"【独家/每周四、六更新】号外！楚明镜身伴多位精品美男，这是道德的沦丧还是人性的扭曲！？咕咕咕咕日报组独家报道！","cover_img":"http://image.yqmh.com/mh/107042_3_4.jpg-noresize.webp","has_video":0},{"comic_id":108431,"comic_name":"宫斗高手在校园","last_chapter_name":"预告","comic_type":"lianai,恋爱|chuanyue,穿越|hougong,后宫","comic_newid":"gdgszxy","comic_author":"九夏动漫","renqi":10919326,"update_time":1604482482000,"shoucang":52738,"comic_grade":"0","cartoon_desc":"【每周六、七更新】前世，她踏着无数敌人的尸体，终于在残酷的宫斗中胜出，当上太后，垂帘听政。却被养子害死，意外穿越到现代，成了一个倍受迫害的16岁少女。\n“想在我面前玩鬼把戏，哀家让你死都不知道怎么死！”","cover_img":"http://image.yqmh.com/mh/108431_3_4.jpg-noresize.webp","has_video":0},{"comic_id":105856,"comic_name":"刀剑斗神传","last_chapter_name":"第2话","comic_type":"gufeng,古风|wuxia,武侠|shenghuo,生活|dongzuo,动作","comic_newid":"daojiandoushenchuan","comic_author":"新漫画","renqi":6064189,"update_time":1512467478000,"shoucang":3616,"comic_grade":"2","cartoon_desc":"这是一个孤独的江湖人遇到绝望的小女孩的故事。所以，这是一个从“无双”到“有双”的故事。","cover_img":"http://image.yqmh.com/mh/105856_3_4.jpg-noresize.webp","has_video":0}]},"status":0,"message":"ok","server_time":1782640690454}
